category_sources: source_facts.description says it manages very large TIFF files; official homepage distributes tools named tifffastcrop, tiffmakemosaic, and tiffsplittiles.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is largetifftools; project literature and package descriptions style the collection as LargeTIFFTools.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official author homepage and best available official documentation/download surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official homepage and source_facts.source-archive provide an official tarball but no official source-control repository URL.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executables identify large TIFF processing command-line tools.
